content.full_text:
Paul Carpenter
Fourth District Member
State Board of Equalization

District Office
4040 Paramount Blvd.
Suite 103
Lakewood, CA 90712
(213) 429-5422

Sacramento Office
1020 N Street
Room 125
Sacramento, CA 95814
(916) 445-4664

February 20, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: Senator Paul Carpenter Committee - ID# 742891

To Whom it May Concern:

I am writing to request information regarding the requirements for
terminating the above referenced committee.

The Senator Paul Carpenter Committee has zero cash-on-hand, but has a
$10,000 outstanding loan due to the committee, and a $25,553.26
accrued expense.

In light of the restrictions placed upon the Committee by
Propositions 68/73, I am unclear how either of these obligations may
be eliminated, and the committee terminated.

No further use of this committee is planned or expected, and if at
all possible, we would appreciate your guidance in how the committee
and its debt and loan may be retired.

Thank you for your help. I may be contacted at the Lakewood
telephone number above if you require further information.

Sincerely,

Ann Peifer
Deputy to Paul Carpenter

Enclosure: Campaign report 7-1-89/12-31-89

February 20, 1990 Fair Political Practices Commission Technical Assistance Division 428 J Street, Suite 800 P.O. Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 Re: Senator Paul Carpenter Committee - ID# 742891 To Whom it May Concern: I am writing to request information regarding the requirements for terminating the above referenced committee. The Senator Paul Carpenter Committee has zero cash-on-hand, but has a $10,000 outstanding loan due to the committee, and a $25,553.26 accrued expense. In light of the restrictions placed upon the Committee by Propositions 68/73, I am unclear how either of these obligations may be eliminated, and the committee terminated. No further use of this committee is planned or expected, and if at all possible, we would appreciate your guidance in how the committee and its debt and loan may be retired. Thank you for your help. I may be contacted at the Lakewood telephone number above if you require further information. Sincerely, Ann Peifer Deputy to Paul Carpenter Enclosure: Campaign report 7-1-89/12-31-89 This document is a candidate and officeholder campaign statement form (Form 490) for the year 1989, as indicated by the "FORM 490 1989" label at the top.
